title: Sneykor's Cobblemon online
description: The modpack contains mods that allow you to have fun playing the Cobblemon mod. There is a new world generation, improved content with Pokémon (Pokémon riding, TM/TR, items, regular and legendary Pokémons), farming, building blocks and storage systems etc.
body:
## This modpack made to play Cobblemon mod with friends

Main mods: [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon), [Cobblemon: Mega Showdown](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-mega-showdown) and add-ons for them
# Pokemon
## Battle with your Pokemons!
![Battle with your Pokemons!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/05e1123f520fccd3655c5b513f4766f5c8c0ac8c.jpeg)
### link:
https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon

## Find Legendaries!
![Find Legendaries](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c84b44dba24f8b41cdb8c03de7194113dd13461a.jpeg)
### links:
https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-myths-and-legends-sidemod

https://modrinth.com/datapack/cobblemon-legendary-structures

## Megas added!
![Megas](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eefe73fab4bdc24c49111e790eaae76977b163b6.jpeg)
### link:
https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-mega-showdown

## TMs/TRs
![TMs/TRs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d504b5c45162fa744c82a409226acd14dad34d86.jpeg)
### link:
https://modrinth.com/mod/simpletms-tms-and-trs-for-cobblemon

### There are mods to help you find, upgrade, breed and train Pokémon

# Other
## New crops!
 ![New crops](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/64a574cf15081d1b20e2cf996b36637a364fe05d.jpeg)

## New horizons of cooking!
![New cooling system](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/160f1e6e95c778c02db9d1a330febbc3fba21d84.jpeg)

## New building blocks
![Building blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb577f1280195d677dcda6a5c0c421818ba3cadd.jpeg)
[Chipped](https://modrinth.com/mod/chipped) mod added so much to build with

## Storage systems
![Storage](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/000d47c22ec2730d5760aadc5afc25e0d6c31bf0.jpeg)
[Sophisticated Storage](https://modrinth.com/mod/sophisticated-storage-(unofficial-fabric-port)) and [Sophisticated Backpacks](https://modrinth.com/mod/sophisticated-backpacks-(unoffical-fabric-port)) added space to store your things

New biomes have been added, world generation, crops, cooking system have been added and more been improved.
